mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, coins, welcome_home_bonus_granted AS welcomeHomeBonusGranted, last_mission_date AS lastMissionDate, created_at AS createdAt, last_access_at AS lastAccessAt FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, coins, welcome_home_bonus_granted AS welcomeHomeBonusGranted, last_mission_date AS lastMissionDate, created_at AS createdAt, last_access_at AS lastAccessAt FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, password_hash, coins, last_mission_date) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{coins}, #{lastMissionDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET coins = #{coins} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET coins = coins + #{amount}, welcome_home_bonus_granted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND welcome_home_bonus_granted = FALSE
UPDATE app_user SET last_mission_date = #{lastMissionDate} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_user SET last_access_at = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
